## Summary

Describe the evidence, profile, transport, test, or documentation change.

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/run_local_checks.py` passes
- [ ] Tests use synthetic evidence and contain no customer identifiers
- [ ] Profile validation passes when profiles changed
- [ ] Fixture validation passes when fixtures changed
- [ ] Device-facing discovery remains observation-only
- [ ] `write_allowed` remains `false`

## Evidence

List the fixture, profile, hardware mode, or public specification used to validate the change.
